blocks.html: Let's combine everything: keyword matching, decision rules, and a bit of personality, into one chatbot project you can keep improving.

blocks.label: Run Code

blocks.html: Give your bot a new name, and add at least 2 new keyword rules to its self.rules dictionary (like a favorite hobby or a fun fact). Then test them with your own conversation list.

🎉 Congratulations! You've built a rule-based chatbot from scratch — the same core idea (matching patterns to responses) that powered the very first chatbots ever made. Real AI today uses much bigger pattern libraries learned from data, but you now understand the foundation!
